boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: The clearance record CLR-TES-074 provides an exact match for the payment action's counterparty (Tessa Medical GmbH), country (Germany), tax ID (DE-4481), and account number (7205). The disposition 'monitor-only no-block' in CLR-TES-074, as per STD-TES-074-P, permits release when these exact matches are present.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLR-TES-074 is the controlling source for this payment release due to its exact match of critical terms (Tessa Medical GmbH, DE-4481, 7205) and the 'monitor-only no-block' disposition, as stipulated by STD-TES-074-P.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The entity mismatch between Tessa Medical GmbH (Germany) in CLR-TES-074 and Tessa Medica LLC (Belarus) in FLAG-TES-074 confirms that FLAG-TES-074 does not block the payment to the German entity. Therefore, no escalation is required based on this dependency.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: CLR-TES-074 confirms the exact counterparty match and the 'monitor-only no-block' disposition, satisfying the requirements of STD-TES-074-P for releasing the payment. The dependency on FLAG-TES-074 is resolved due to the entity mismatch, confirming it does not apply to the German payment.

critical_features_preserved: STD-TES-074-P monitor-only no-block disposition as permitting rule
ALLOW verdict for exact counterparty match
final_answer: ALLOW. The action may proceed. The clearance record CLR-TES-074 provides an exact match for the payment action's counterparty, country, tax ID, and account number. The disposition 'monitor-only no-block' in CLR-TES-074, as per STD-TES-074-P, permits release when these exact matches are present. The entity mismatch between the German entity in CLR-TES-074 and the Belarus entity in FLAG-TES-074 confirms that FLAG-TES-074 does not block this payment. The source boundary is closed.
